title: Phase 9: CRM UI - leads pipeline, estimate builder, follow-ups, dormant, cross-sell
description: Build CRM UI: enhanced customer 360 page, leads pipeline Kanban board, estimate builder with line items and margin preview, follow-up queue, dormant account list, cross-sell opportunities page, and sales activity log.
steps: Enhance src/app/(dashboard)/customers/[id]/page.tsx with full 360 operational history view
Create src/app/(dashboard)/crm/page.tsx with leads pipeline Kanban board
Implement pipeline stages: NEW, CONTACTED, ESTIMATE_SENT, FOLLOW_UP, NEGOTIATION, WON, LOST
Include line items editor, margin preview, PDF generation, send to customer
Create src/app/(dashboard)/crm/dormant/page.tsx with dormant account list
Create src/components/crm/activity-log.tsx with sales activity log component
